asa-autobots:2-design:p2p-manager-code.text: note that the two agents should cooperate and act on the same knowledge, meaning that if one agent is going to pick up parcel 2 then the other ideally shouldn't consider going to pick up that as it's what the other is doing, so I want to have some shared knowledge that each can "claim" or something along those lines to avoid racing to achieve the same thing and therefore getting stuck

also with this in mind is it better to have separate scripts for the agents and a script for the state handler or evaluation engine which can be queried for the information or is it better to duplicate it and sync it? I don't know which would be best for access and ease of use
